title: strategy_001_multi_timeframe_trend_alignment
thesis_bullets: STRATEGY: Multi-Timeframe Trend Alignment (4h Trend + 1h Entry) ASSET: BTC, ETH TIMEFRAME: 1h entries, 4h trend context MARKET CONDITION: Trending on higher timeframe, pullback on lower timeframe TYPE: Multi-timeframe trend following CONCEPT: The most robust trading strategies align multiple timeframes.
We use the 4h chart to determine trend direction and only take 1h entries in that direction.
This means we need 4h indicator values available on the 1h chart.
The 4h trend tells us WHAT to trade (long or short), the 1h tells us WHEN to enter.
This dramatically reduces false signals because you’re always trading with the bigger picture.

INDICATORS USED (4h context - calculated on 1h using 4x periods): - EMA 200 on 1h (equivalent to ~EMA 50 on 4h) - major trend direction - EMA 800 on 1h (equivalent to ~EMA 200 on 4h) - macro trend filter - ADX calculated on last 56 bars of 1h (equivalent to 14 bars on 4h) - trend strength INDICATORS USED (1h entry): - RSI (period 14) - pullback detection - MACD (fast 12, slow 26, signal 9) - momen
Price pulls back below EMA 21 on 1h (short-term dip within uptrend) 3.
RSI(14) drops below 40 (pullback has some depth, not just a 1-bar dip) 4.
MACD histogram turns from negative to positive (momentum shifting back up) 5.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 4h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 4h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
